summary: Focused on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing HID firmware and input drivers, and experimenting with on-device LLMs and computer vision. Also maintained several trading bots, Telegram automation tools, and a Windows file tagging utility.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware v13 development
items.description: Worked on the next version of the feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware, adding fire-and-forget event emitting and an 8x8 matrix variant.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a KMDF input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events, with push-style event delivery and integration testing.

items.title: Android TTS engine integration
items.description: Iterated on the Android text-to-speech app, adding multiple TTS engines, pitch control, and intonation features.

items.title: CV-based aim assist and input emulation
items.description: Enhanced the computer vision and input emulation tool with GPU inference, new aiming modes, and overlay improvements.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform rewrite
items.description: Completed a major .NET rewrite of the algorithmic trading platform, adding deployment pipelines, MCP server, and full feature set.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware v13 refinement
items.description: Polished the v13 firmware variant with fixes and a new 8x8 matrix draft.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Maintained the file tagging tool, fixing changelog generation and preserving desktop.ini entries.

items.title: CV-based aim assist enhancements
items.description: Improved the aim assist tool with YOLO confidence thresholds, runtime fallback to USB-HID, and debug overlay.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted extensive experiments with mixture-of-experts architectures and ensemble methods for a crypto prediction model.

items.title: On-device LLM with phone capabilities
items.description: Built an Android app for running local LLMs with tool use, sub-agent delegation, and background processing.

items.title: Input emulation and overlay system
items.description: Rewrote the overlay to D3D11, added linger mode and autofire, and restricted aim assist to focused windows.

items.title: E-ink device custom firmware
items.description: Developed a knowledge base app, map viewer, and improved book reading support for the xteink firmware fork.

items.title: File tagging utility release management
items.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines, automated Microsoft Store publishing, and added CLI features for the Windows Explorer tagging tool.

items.title: Graph-powered code intelligence engine
items.description: Expanded the code analysis tool with LSP integration, more language parsers, and dead code detection.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, fast YOLO labeling tool with multi-select mark mode and batch operations.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained the n8n community node for Telegram, fixing authentication and CI issues.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a pipeline for detecting poker hands, board cards, and actions from video feeds.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware maintenance
items.description: Fixed a graceful COM restart issue in the firmware.

items.title: Input emulation tool updates
items.description: Made general updates to the CV and input emulation project.

items.title: File tagging utility feature additions
items.description: Added support for additional metadata properties and prepared the v2.0 release for the Microsoft Store.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware v11 development
items.description: Developed a major firmware update with new devices, BLE improvements, and performance profiles.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Worked on the multi-session AI coding assistant, adding squash merging and worktree completion features.

items.title: Input emulation and HID experimentation
items.description: Experimented with USB HID mouse movement and rate limiting for the aim assist tool.

items.title: Telegram bot for Freqtrade monitoring
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram interface for monitoring and managing Freqtrade trading bots.

items.title: Telegram assistant bot
items.description: Developed a Telegram bot for content forwarding, summarization, and multi-target sending.

items.title: Freqtrade trading strategies
items.description: Created and optimized numerous trading strategies with backtesting and hyperopt configurations.

items.title: Flutter app for Freqtrade monitoring
items.description: Built a mobile app with dashboard, charts, and trade monitoring for Freqtrade bots.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Iterated on trading strategies, performing hyperopt optimization and backtesting.

items.title: Windows file tagging utility early development
items.description: Started the file tagging project with CLI and UI foundations.
